title: Twerking Plants
description: Twerk for those plants. Twerking encourages faster plant growth
body: There is a plugin that allows users to twerk and speed up growth of the plants around them by default this a 3 block radius but this can be changed in the config file of the block. Example config. [Demo Video](https://youtu.be/qix0yTbISVI) ```yml radius: 3 WHEAT: true CARROTS: true POTATOES: true BEETROOTS: true NETHER_WART: true TORCHFLOWER: true PITCHER: true TREES: true ``` Please consider donating.
